title: Slow Roasted Australian Chinese Broccoli Skillet
description: A low-sodium, midnight-craving Australian dish featuring roasted Chinese broccoli, served in a molcajete vessel. This recipe combines the flavors of Australia with the steam cooking method of Japan, known as mushimono.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a molcajete vessel, combine the Chinese broccoli, olive oil, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
Toss the ingredients together until the Chinese broccoli is evenly coated.
Add the water to the molcajete vessel and cover it with aluminum foil.
Roast the Chinese broccoli in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes, or until the Chinese broccoli is tender and slightly caramelized.
Remove the molcajete vessel from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the slow roasted Chinese broccoli hot, garnished with additional grated ginger if desired.
